name: Healthcare
description: Base healthcare sector overlay. Applies to all covered entities and business associates under HIPAA. Subsector profiles (provider, payer, digital health) extend this.

conditional_frameworks.FedRAMP: If serving federal health agencies (VA, CMS, DoD health)

required_artifacts: Access control audit logs (90 days minimum)
Incident log and breach notification history
typical_gaps: BAA not executed with all applicable vendors
Access rights not reviewed on termination
Audit logs not reviewed on regular schedule
Minimum necessary not defined for key workflows

document_patterns.policy_header: includes covered entity designation, HIPAA regulatory citations
document_patterns.policy_statement: references workforce obligations and PHI handling requirements
document_patterns.enforcement: references sanctions up to and including termination and regulatory referral
